Oh, create a new route called mock-up slash, mock-up MVP, and then it will do it for you, and just stay in the same branch, and give the guys the branch.
Just like, if any of you review my branch, and you see that I'm  up on something really bad, that's gonna create more work for us later, just let me know so I stop doing it.
No worries.
Cool.
Awesome.
Cool.
Cheers, y'all.
Thanks, guys.
Cheers.

## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on CheckThat project progress, discuss UI/UX decisions, and align on MVP priorities for public and private experiences.](https://fathom.video/share/2wvHQqak9AdoaS4d4KcpTs4pEdodqXRF?tab=summary&timestamp=3205.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Public pages (home, categories, subcategories, brand) prioritized for SEO; aiming for next week launch](https://fathom.video/share/2wvHQqak9AdoaS4d4KcpTs4pEdodqXRF?tab=summary&timestamp=3205.0)
  - [Logged-in MVP experience focused on basic brand setup, prompt tracking, and analytics](https://fathom.video/share/2wvHQqak9AdoaS4d4KcpTs4pEdodqXRF?tab=summary&timestamp=3411.0)
  - [UI to leverage ShadCN components for consistency and efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/2wvHQqak9AdoaS4d4KcpTs4pEdodqXRF?tab=summary&timestamp=4012.0)
  - [Marcel to create MVP mockups for both public and logged-in experiences](https://fathom.video/share/2wvHQqak9AdoaS4d4KcpTs4pEdodqXRF?tab=summary&timestamp=3649.0)

## Topics

### Public Page Development

  - [Estevão working on public pages: home, categories, subcategories, brand](https://fathom.video/share/2wvHQqak9AdoaS4d4KcpTs4pEdodqXRF?tab=summary&timestamp=3859.0)
  - [SEO considerations: ensure all content is indexable, avoid hidden elements](https://fathom.video/share/2wvHQqak9AdoaS4d4KcpTs4pEdodqXRF?tab=summary&timestamp=2630.0)
  - [Categories page to be updated with tile-based layout for better UX](https://fathom.video/share/2wvHQqak9AdoaS4d4KcpTs4pEdodqXRF?tab=summary&timestamp=2369.0)
  - [Search functionality to start simple with ShadCN combobox component](https://fathom.video/share/2wvHQqak9AdoaS4d4KcpTs4pEdodqXRF?tab=summary&timestamp=2931.0)

### Logged-in Experience MVP

  - [Focus on basic brand setup, prompt tracking, and simple analytics](https://fathom.video/share/2wvHQqak9AdoaS4d4KcpTs4pEdodqXRF?tab=summary&timestamp=3411.0)
  - [Jose to prioritize building bare-bones logged-in features by month-end](https://fathom.video/share/2wvHQqak9AdoaS4d4KcpTs4pEdodqXRF?tab=summary&timestamp=3620.0)
  - [Marcel to create mockups for MVP logged-in screens, removing non-essential features](https://fathom.video/share/2wvHQqak9AdoaS4d4KcpTs4pEdodqXRF?tab=summary&timestamp=3729.0)

### UI Component Strategy

  - [Leveraging ShadCN components as much as possible for consistency](https://fathom.video/share/2wvHQqak9AdoaS4d4KcpTs4pEdodqXRF?tab=summary&timestamp=4012.0)
  - [Custom components only when necessary (e.g., specialized charts)](https://fathom.video/share/2wvHQqak9AdoaS4d4KcpTs4pEdodqXRF?tab=summary&timestamp=4043.0)
  - [Aim for a "Vercel-like" aesthetic for efficiency and modern look](https://fathom.video/share/2wvHQqak9AdoaS4d4KcpTs4pEdodqXRF?tab=summary&timestamp=4137.0)

### Data Migration and Tracking

  - [Urgency to start tracking data for existing clients to avoid historical data loss](https://fathom.video/share/2wvHQqak9AdoaS4d4KcpTs4pEdodqXRF?tab=summary&timestamp=3557.0)
  - [Plan to export current prompts from Scrunch and import into new system](https://fathom.video/share/2wvHQqak9AdoaS4d4KcpTs4pEdodqXRF?tab=summary&timestamp=3594.0)
  - [Daniel to prepare prompts for the first three (possibly all five) funnel stages by Wednesday](https://fathom.video/share/2wvHQqak9AdoaS4d4KcpTs4pEdodqXRF?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)

### Search Functionality

  - [Initial implementation to use ShadCN combobox for simplicity](https://fathom.video/share/2wvHQqak9AdoaS4d4KcpTs4pEdodqXRF?tab=summary&timestamp=2931.0)
  - [Future iterations may include more advanced modal-based search experience](https://fathom.video/share/2wvHQqak9AdoaS4d4KcpTs4pEdodqXRF?tab=summary&timestamp=2837.0)
  - [Aim for Notion-like efficiency in search results presentation](https://fathom.video/share/2wvHQqak9AdoaS4d4KcpTs4pEdodqXRF?tab=summary&timestamp=2855.0)

### Onboarding and Sign-up Flow

  - [To be addressed after public pages are live](https://fathom.video/share/2wvHQqak9AdoaS4d4KcpTs4pEdodqXRF?tab=summary&timestamp=3017.0)
  - [Consider various paths: immediate sign-up vs. "hooked" experience leading to sign-up](https://fathom.video/share/2wvHQqak9AdoaS4d4KcpTs4pEdodqXRF?tab=summary&timestamp=3017.0)
  - [Marcel to mock up basic onboarding flow if time permits](https://fathom.video/share/2wvHQqak9AdoaS4d4KcpTs4pEdodqXRF?tab=summary&timestamp=3017.0)
